strategies: Lead with one bold outcome claim — longest runners never multi-benefit pitch.
Static image ads still drive 60–70% of Meta conversions; never skip them.
UGC-style video dominates 30+ day survivors across every ecommerce niche.
Gift-framing and social proof badges (reviews, press) extend ad life dramatically.
Evergreen problem-solvers outlast trend products — solve a pain that never goes away.
summary: The longest-running ads across Meta and TikTok share three traits: they solve a single, universally relatable problem, lead with one clear claim or outcome (a number, a transformation, or a bold dare), and use authentic UGC-style or bold static creative that blends into the feed rather than looking like a traditional ad. They keep working because the underlying problem — bad posture, dull skin, cheap cookware cycles, kitchen friction — never goes away, making the ad perpetually relevant to new audiences entering the top of the funnel every day.
